name: contract
summary: Meta-feature owning all cross-feature templates, schemas, dispatch scripts, and enforcement checks (hard-rules R1-R9, naming-convention).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native workflow contract mechanism
spec_no_change_reason: issue #399 Phase 1 (coexistence window, #450 Pattern 1) makes contract's spec/contract path resolution dual-read (specs/ preferred, docs/spec/ fallback) within the existing spec/contract-file invariants (Inv 14, Inv 38); no new or amended invariant — purely an implementation-internal path-resolution change
